markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.048 — Certified Information

The department may disclose information under Section 521.046 (Disclosure of Collision and Conviction Information) or 521.047 (Disclosure of Information to License Holder) that is certified by the custodian of records on payment of a $10 fee for each individual request.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*
